description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'CI: build & test library and apps' that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, on merge group checks requested, and on workflow dispatch with an optional debug input. The workflow should find changed files, then for each changed file, build and test on multiple platforms (ubuntu, macos, windows) with different Python versions (10-13) and architectures (x64, arm64).
